turns.content: Hey, I'm having some issues with your SaaS product, it's supposed to sync my data across all devices but it's just not doing that, I've tried restarting and all but nothing's working, I'm getting pretty frustrated here.

I'm so sorry to hear that you're experiencing issues with our product, can you please tell me a bit more about your setup and what you've tried so far, like what devices are you using and what kind of data are you trying to sync, this will help me narrow down the possible causes.

Okay, um, I'm using a desktop and a laptop, both are Windows, and I'm trying to sync some project files, I've tried restarting both devices and also checked for any updates, but nothing seems to be working, I'm not super tech-savvy so I don't know if I'm just missing something obvious or what.

That helps a lot, thanks for the details, I think I might know what could be the issue, sometimes our software can get stuck if the devices aren't on the same network, can you please check if both your desktop and laptop are connected to the same Wi-Fi network, and also make sure that you're using the latest version of our software on both devices.

Yeah, they're on the same network, I'm pretty sure, I mean I've checked the Wi-Fi symbol on both and it says connected, but how do I check for the software version, I don't wanna mess anything up, can you walk me through that part, I don't wanna break anything.

To check the software version, you can click on the gear icon in the top right corner of the app, then click on 'About' and it should show you the version number, if you're not on the latest version, we can walk through the update process, also, just to confirm, when you say the data isn't syncing, are you getting any error messages or is it just not showing up on the other device, any details you can provide will help me troubleshoot the issue.

Okay, I think I found it, I'm on version 2.5, but the website says the latest is 2.7, so I guess that's the problem, but how do I update it without losing all my project files, I've got a lot of work in there and I don't wanna start over, can you promise me that updating won't delete anything, I'm getting a bit anxious about this.

Don't worry, updating to the latest version should not affect your project files, our update process is designed to preserve all user data, I can guide you through the update process if you'd like, and just to be safe, I recommend backing up your project files before updating, we have a backup feature built into the app that you can use, would you like me to walk you through that as well, and then we can proceed with the update.

That sounds good, yeah, please walk me through the backup process, I don't wanna take any chances, and then we can do the update, I just want to get this working again, it's been really frustrating, but thanks for your help so far, you've been really patient and helpful.

You're welcome, I'm here to help, okay, so to back up your project files, you can go to the 'File' menu and click on 'Backup', then select a location to save the backup file, make sure it's somewhere you can easily find it, like your desktop or documents folder, and then click 'Backup' to start the process, it should only take a few minutes, once that's done, we can proceed with updating the software to the latest version, sound good
